title: Norm
description: Standalone governance archetype for Norm — measurable constraint predicates (DNA 'N'). Operationalizes a Directive's intent into an evaluable predicate. Faster-changing than Directive.

guard.description: CEL expression — activation condition. Predicate is only evaluated when guard is true.

predicate.description: CEL expression returning boolean. The constraint. References exactly one ElementArchetype by name as root identifier, then navigates its JSON fields. Example: SecurityProperties.encryptionLevel >= 'AES-128'.

toleranceMode.description: How violations are measured over time.

temporalWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration for time-based tolerance modes. Required when toleranceMode is time-based (AVERAGED, PERCENTILE, RATE, SUSTAINED, CUMULATIVE, SLIDING).

temporalAggregation.description: Aggregation function applied to values within the temporalWindow.

sustainedThreshold.description: Ratio [0,1] — fraction of temporalWindow the predicate must hold. Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED.
